title: WynnToolZ
description: WynnToolZ is a client-side Fabric mod that adds practical Wynncraft utilities for mounts and some other optional quality of life additions.
body:
# WynnToolZ

This mod provides features and quality of life improvements for Wynncraft.  
For more information about the server, visit [https://wynncraft.com/](https://wynncraft.com/)

---
### Mounts
---
- **Mount Helper**: Highlights nearby powerups in the world with name labels and other relevant info.
- **Mount Stats Overlay**: A draggable, resizable, and lockable HUD showing your mount's stats, limits, level, and total energy. Includes **auto-updating** for real-time tracking.
- **Mount Item Overlay**: Adds potential info and stat bars on top of mount items (including Mount Potential and Level/Limit visualization), perfect for browsing the Trade Market.
- **Mount Camera**: Automatically switches perspective when you mount and dismount, with scroll zoom, offset controls, and a hold-to-look-around mode.
- **Mount Skin Reporting**: Collects the skin of every mount you purchase from an NPC to send to the WTZ API if you have linked the mod.

---
### Bank Filters
---
- Adds mount-specific filters to Wynntils bank search — search by **mount type**, **primary color**, or **secondary color**.

---
### Shopping & Trade Market
---
- **Shopping List**: A draggable in-game overlay with multiple lists, quantity tracking, and import/export functionality.
- **Trade Market Search**: Click any shopping list entry to instantly search for it in the Trade Market.

---
### User Interface
---
- **Look Line**: Draws a configurable line from your camera toward the block you're looking at — great for use with shoulder-surfing style mods.

---
### Quality of Life
---
- **Quick Back Navigation**: Right-click empty menu space to go back when available.
- **Overlay Tweaks**: Hide the Wynncraft UI while chat is open, or move it above the chat input (keeps NPC dialogue above the chat box).

---
### Miscellaneous
---
- **Shout TTS**: Reads Wynncraft shouts aloud using TikTok TTS voices, with volume control, random voice mode, and previews.

---
## Commands
- `/wtz link` — Opens the WynnToolZ authentication page to enable Mount Skin Reporting and other features.
- `/wtz link status` — Shows your current link and connection status.
- `/wtz unlink` — Removes the saved token.

## Support
Join [The Mount Tryhards Discord](https://discord.gg/XqFsQQzTEc) for Support & Feedback
